major: Bachelor of Applied Science in Electronic Engineering
description: Sixth-semester Applied Electronics Engineering student at the State Polytechnic of Semarang (GPA: 3.56/4.00). Interested in IoT, PLC, and Industrial Automation, with experience in embedded systems, hardware integration, and automation projects.

Graduated from SMK Negeri 7 Purworejo, majoring in Electrical Power Installation Engineering. Gained practical experience in electrical installations, motor control, panel wiring, and troubleshooting, which built a strong foundation for pursuing Applied Electronics Engineering.
